article_items.title: Company : TechCrunch AI
article_items.description: [HIGH] Nvidia wants to cut data center water use, but that’s not the same as fixing AI’s water problem Company : TechCrunch AI Summary : Nvidia announced a new cooling system that cuts water use inside the data center. But it does nothing to address AI's biggest water use — fossil fuel power plants. Link :

article_items.description: ⚡ BREAKING AI UPDATE 🚨 83 New AI Events Detected 23 Jun 2026, 07:21 AM IST Major AI events just happened. Here's what you need to know: HIGH 💰 FINANCE & FINTECH AI SpaceX Fall Continues, Erasing Billions in Market Value 📌 Bloomberg Tech SpaceX shares slipped for a third straight day, shedding hundreds of billions of dollars in market value, after the company said it is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time. Bloomberg's Anthony Stephens and Norah Mulinda break down the latest developments.
